items.text:
# **CASTING CALL -** *That's Deeply Human*

*That's Deeply Human* is a short film currently in pre-production, shooting in Bournemouth this summer. It's a contemporary psychological drama about a young woman who moves to a new city and slowly loses her ability to feel things without outsourcing her emotions.

It's funny, it's real, and by the end it's devastating in the way only very ordinary things can be.

**THE ROLES**
*Thomas*: Late 20s to early 30s. Male. Anna's long distance boyfriend. Warm, present, genuinely loving. We need real emotional generosity and the ability to say everything with very little.

*Mila*: Late 20s. Female. Anna's new friend and colleague. Open, funny, naturally warm. The person who would reach Anna if Anna let her. We need easy charisma and genuine presence on screen.

**THE PRODUCTION**
This is a **voluntary** student thesis production from Bournemouth University's MA Filmmaking programme. Expenses like food and travel will be covered. The film will be submitted to festivals upon completion.

If this sounds like you, or someone you know, we'd love to hear from you. Please send a recent headshot, any self-tape or showreel material, and a short note about yourself and your interest in the role.

DM or contact at

qaldasm@gmail.com

utkuafacan1@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'casting call ABoumnemodhUniesty/astesP University Masters Production ABour SUPPORTING ROLES Mila: Female (20s-30s) Thomas: Male (20s-30s) Contact: qaldasm@gmail.com .com utkuafacan1@gmail.com utkuafacan 1@gmail.com That S Deeply Human is a contemporary short film about a young woman who moves to a new city and slowly loses her ability to process her own emotions without the mediation of AI. It's funny, it' S quiet, and it's devastating. That'sDeeplyHuman That's Deeply Human Filming Dates Beginning of July'

items.text:
TV COMEDY/DRAMA - CASTING CALL
We're developing a new sitcom project and are interested in connecting with comedic

performers from a wide range of backgrounds for potential principal and supporting roles.

The production is currently looking to meet actors aged 18 to 50 years old, who can be based in the Isle of Wight for filming towards the end of the year (filming dates TBA)

The show centres around a diverse ensemble of 10 core characters and we are especially keen to receive applications from Black and Asian actors. We welcome submissions from performers of all backgrounds.

If you would like to be considered, please email us the following:

🎭 𝗔 𝘀𝗵𝗼𝗿𝘁 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝘀𝗲𝗹𝗳-𝘁𝗮𝗽𝗲 (𝟯𝟬–𝟲𝟬 𝘀𝗲𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗱𝘀)

Please start by saying:

• Your full name

• Your age

• Representation (if any)

Then talk a little about yourself or your experience, so we can see your personality.

Please also include:

• Links to any showreels, Spotlight profiles, or previous acting work if you have any.

⚠️ 𝗜𝗠𝗣𝗢𝗥𝗧𝗔𝗡𝗧: 

Applicants must be over 18.

Once submissions are reviewed, suitable actors may be contacted and sent character briefs and scenes to read.

These will be paid roles on commencement of filming. Details will be discussed with those successful at audition. Travel Costs will be provided for talent that does not live local to the Isle of Wight, if invited to face to face auditions.

Please email submissions to: cowandbeaverproductions@gmail.com

topComments.text: I'm on the Isle of Wight and interested. I'll send through a video tomorrow (P.S, saying "in" instead of "on" the Isle of Wight, really annoys us islanders 😂).

items.text:
🎥 CASTING CALL – ROOM FOR THOUGHT 🎥

We're looking for people to take part in a episode of a brand-new discussion series, **Room For Thought**.

🗣️ Episode Topic:
**Is Cancel Culture Justified?**

This episode will bring together people with different opinions and experiences to discuss a series of thought-provoking statements in a respectful and open environment.

Some of the statements include:

• "People deserve a second chance, even if they've said something offensive."
• "Losing your job over something you said online is an unfair punishment."
• "Cancel culture has gone too far and is now used to silence legitimate opinions."
• "Everyone is one mistake away from being cancelled."

We're looking for people who:
✅ Have an opinion
✅ Are comfortable sharing their perspective
✅ Can respectfully disagree with others
✅ Are aged 18+

📍 London
🎥 Filmed for social media and YouTube
📅 28th June 2026 

If you'd like to take part, comment below or send us a direct message with:

• Name
• Age
• Location
• A few sentences about your view on cancel culture

We welcome all perspectives. The aim is not to argue or "win" a debate, but to have honest conversations and explore different viewpoints.

#RoomForThought #CastingCall #SocialExperiment #Discussion #CancelCulture #London #Essex #YouTube #Community

Zapraszamy osoby polskojęzyczne w wieku 17-60 lat do udziału w nagraniach programu jako publiczność!

To świetna okazja, by zobaczyć telewizję od kulis, poczuć atmosferę prawdziwego planu zdjęciowego i przeżyć wyjątkową przygodę.

Terminy nagrań w czerwcu:
15, 16, 18, 19, 22

Wynagrodzenie: 100 zł gotówką po zakończeniu nagrania
Zgłoszenia:
https://forms.gle/WbMaogE36qVvmd4C6

Nie przegap okazji i dołącz do widowni kultowego teleturnieju!

items.text:
🎙️ SZUKAM GŁOSU!

Nagrywam podcast o Italii — tej prawdziwej, tej przeżytej na własnej skórze, z humorem, z językowymi wpadkami, z kuriozalnymi sytuacjami, z lokalnym kolorytem, śmiechem i zapachem espresso o poranku.

Szukam kobiety z uśmiechem w głosie, z głosem, który ekscytuje, zaciekawia, przyciąga. Kogoś, kto umie opowiadać nie tylko słowami, ale też melodią głosu.

🎧 To będzie podcast pełen życia. Chcę, żeby słuchacze czuli się, jakby siedzieli ze mną w Neapolu przy kawie i słuchali historii, których nie ma w przewodnikach.

🎤 Planowana sesja nagraniowa: 5 - 12 lipca.

Projekt jest komercyjny – oferuję wynagrodzenie dla lektorki. ( 1000 zł za pracę,  a po montażu przed publikacją dodatkowe wynagrodzenie - umowa ) 

Jeśli czujesz, że masz to coś w głosie, daj znać. 

Napisz 📆 wiadomość prywatną lub komentarz.

Moje podróże są na instagramie: @WYCIECZKO

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of clarinet

topComments.text: Dzień dobry! Mam uśmiech i życie w głosie i kocham opowiadać! 😁🌞 Napisałam wiadomość 😊
Długo Pan szuka…. Ofert jest moc…. A może po prostu proszę podesłać mi fragment konkretnego tekstu :) odeślę nagranie i poczujemy to razem :)

items.text:
Lovely session with this lot today for the June monthly class. 
Today’s session was scriptwork.
I absolutely love that if you give 2 people the same script they will come at it with totally different interpretations.
Some stunning work from the group. 

The next class is on Saturday July 18th 2-5pm at @crescenttheatre and spaces for that class go on sale on Monday. 

#theworkshop #actor #actorsstudio #brumtalent

Przechodnie w Paryżu – osoby pochodzenia azjatyckiego, afrykańskiego oraz bliskowschodniego. Serial. 

🔹 Kobiety i mężczyźni 20 - 50 lat
https://casting-app.pl/apply/d4eae4264cad4fd59942f25fefe6fb1a

📍 Termin zdjęć: 19 czerwca 
📍 Miejsce: Warszawa 
📍 Charakter zdjęć: dzienne 
💰 Stawka: 250 zł za dzień zdjęciowy - (płatne gotówką po planie) 
📸 Wymagania: tylko cudzoziemcy
📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać tylko przez link zamieszczony pod nazwą roli. 
❗ Zgłoszenia na maila nie będą rozpatrywane

TOMORROW! First class FREE!!!

DM to book in. 🙌

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

items.text:
**MALE GYMNAST NEEDED to play a body double Location   (LONDON)**

@everyone We're urgently looking for **experienced gymnasts** for an exciting upcoming production in **London**.

This is a **fantastic opportunity to be part of an amazing production** and is a **paid role**.

**Important:** Applicants must be between **5'7" and 5'10"** as this role is for a **body/ stand in  double for a well -known artist **.

Please share with anyone suitable in your network.

If interested, please send your details, recent photos, height, and any relevant gymnastics or stunt experience.

We'd love to hear from you! 🎬🤸‍♀️🤸‍♂️#**gymnasts #castingcall #marksummerscasting #marksummers #castingcall **#ukcasting

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'MARK SUMMERS CASTING TING CASTING CALL MALE GYMNASTS REQUIRED CORE REQUIREMENTS PLAYING AGE PLAYINGAGE20-35 20- 35 MALE HEIGHT 5'7 5'10" BUILD LEAN (NOT OVERLY MUSCULAR) BASED UK BASED PLEASE REACH OUT EMAIL YOUR PICTURES, LOCATION, EXPERIENCE AND CONTACT DETAILS TO: BODYDOUBLE@MARKSUMMER BODYDOUBLE@ COM'

items.text:
**CASTING DO SERIALU TRUDNE SPRAWY**

Jesteś młody, masz talent aktorski, charyzmę przed kamerą i marzysz o występach w profesjonalnej produkcji? Nie czekaj, to właśnie Twoja szansa. Rozpoczynam casting i szukam osób do różnych ról.
> Zaznaczam, że do głównych ról szukam tylko i wyłącznie osób z warsztatem aktorskim bądź z dużym doświadczeniem na planach **

**KOGO SZUKAM??**

**Role pierwszoplanowe:**
* Klara Rudzka (22 l.) - główna bohaterka: ***23-25.06.2026***

*(Atrakcyjna, zadbana, pełna energii i pozytywna. Jej ojciec zostawił rodzinę, matka jest właścicielką gabinetu medycyny estetycznej. Klara studiuje architekturę)****.***
* Michał Liszka (24 l.) - chłopak Klary: ***23-25.06.2026***

*(Przystojny, szarmancki. Studiuje architekturę, pochodzi z niezamożnej rodziny, ale studia to było jego marzenie i sam na nie pracuje. Zakochany w Klarze, chce jej zaimponować, dlatego dał się namówić koledze na występowanie jako chippendale).*

**Epizodyści:**
* Jacek Malik (25 l.) - syn wspólniczki Marty: ***23-25.06.2026**** (Przystojny. Trochę śliski. Typ imprezowicza.)*
* Jagoda Malik (45 l.) - wspólniczka Marty: ***24.06.2026 ****(Zadbana, obrotna bizneswoman)*
* Miłosz (23 l.) - współlokator Michała: ***25.06.2026***

** Mniejsze epizody, statyści z tekstem:

**Taksówkarz - *****23.06 i 25.06.2026 (2 sceny)***

**Ochroniarz - *****25.06.2026 (1 scena)***

Jeżeli uważasz, że pasujesz do którejś z wyżej wymienionych postaci, pasuje ci podany termin i chciałbyś/chciałabyś wystąpić w telewizji - *,,napisz do mnie w prywatnej wiadomości lub zadzwoń pod numer ****tel. 798 970 883''***

items.text:
Dzień dobry!
Nazywam się Katarzyna Maria Zawadzka. Jestem aktorką oraz trenerką aktorstwa i wystąpień publicznych. 🎭

Oferuję wsparcie dzieciom i młodzieży w przygotowaniu do:

✨ castingów filmowych i reklamowych,✨ konkursów aktorskich,✨ wystąpień publicznych wymagających świadomej autoprezentacji.

Pomagam również w przygotowaniu profesjonalnych wizytówek aktorskich zgodnych z aktualnymi standardami branżowymi oraz w nagrywaniu scen castingowych. Prowadzę także regularne lekcje aktorstwa zarówno online, jak i stacjonarnie. 🎬

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 W swojej pracy wspieram również rodziców i opiekunów, zwłaszcza tych, którzy nie są związani z branżą filmową lub teatralną. Pomagam świadomie planować rozwój kariery młodych aktorek i aktorów, podpowiadam, jak odnaleźć się podczas castingów, na jakiej podstawie podejmować trafne decyzje dotyczące współpracy z agencjami i produkcjami oraz jak rozpoznawać potencjalne zagrożenia związane z działalnością w branży.

🤸‍♀️ Od niemal roku z powodzeniem współpracuję także z dziewczęcą grupą wyczynowej gimnastyki powietrznej. Wspieram zawodniczki w budowaniu postaci scenicznej do choreografii, rozwijaniu ekspresji, emocjonalności, charyzmy oraz świadomej interakcji z publicznością i jury.

🏆 Brałam również udział jako trenerka dziecięcych aktorów przy realizacji wielokrotnie nagradzanego na festiwalach filmu krótkometrażowego „Iron Cloud” w reżyserii Nikodema Wojciechowskiego.

📩 Zapraszam do kontaktu!Chętnie odpowiem na pytania i opowiem o możliwościach współpracy dostosowanych do indywidualnych potrzeb dziecka, młodzieży lub grupy.

📧 E-mail: kmzawadzkatrener@gmail.com

💬 Lub wiadomość prywatna

☎️ Lub tel. 732 561 386

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'AKADEMIA TALENTÓW JAROSŁAWIEC Pani Katarzyna Aktorstwo scena pewność siebie Zajęcia aktorskie Pani Katarzyny pomagają dzieciom rozwijać odwagę, ekspresję swobodę wystąpień publicznych. Poprzez scenki, ruch, zabawę mini musical uczestnicy uczą się sie pracy emocjami, wyrazu scenicznego budowania pewności siebie. 15+ lat pracy dziećmi mini musical wystąpienia publiczne wyraz sceniczny dla dzieci 6-12lat 6-12 lat kameralne grupy Scena zaczyna się od odwagi!'
May be an image of text that says 'Polska Polsko(Poland) (Poland) Szukoj sinsay Wo_aeopeteo Dom Polecane Kobieta Dziecko Metezyzna Л a Wyszukaj oliwiajozwiak.official'

Promuj Promujpost post 17 2 1 Lubią to oliwiajozwiak.official inne osoby kmzawadzka Intensywna owocna lekcja aktorstwa! z niezwykle utalentowaną Goliwiajozwiak.official więcej Odpowiedz oliwiajozwiak.official Polecam P. Kasie z całego serca'

items.text:
WARSZAWA// CASTING 

Poszukujemy aktorów dubbingowych do niezależnej animacji, z wyjątkowym przesłaniem. 

Realizacja: jeden dzień pomiędzy 1 - 15 lipca 2026 r. w Warszawie. 

Poszukujemy głosów do ról:
* Chłopiec - 7-11 lat 
* Dziewczynka - 8 - 11 lat 
* Chłopiec - 8 - 12 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 25- 45 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 28-45 lat
* Mężczyzna - 40-55 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyźni - 27-45 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyzna - 35- 50 lat (z dobrym akcentem amerykańskim!)

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: 
* portfolio
* próbkę głosu 
* dostępność w lipcu (prosimy o wypisanie konkretnych dni) 

Zgłoszenia: 

Na maila: [aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com](mailto:aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com)

Tytuł: Animacja dubbing casting + nazwa roli (np. Mężczyzna 35-50 lat)

BARDZO proszę o przestrzeganie tytułowania maili. 

Zlecenie: płatne. 

Szczegóły projektu wyślemy wybranym osobom :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an illustration of text that says 'Red Ribbon a Michał Cygan film POLAND LAND AIR AIRMA M A USA U USA AIR AIRMAIN M4 M Animation by Izabella Anguiano Jacobs'

May be an illustration of text that says 'Logline When a young boy meets an elderly man in a New York cemetery he is drawn into the haunting story of stolen child, love torn apart during the Second World War, and a lifelong search fuelled by hope. ねさ R'

* Mężczyzna - 35- 50 lat (z dobrym akcentem amerykańskim!)

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: 
* portfolio
* próbkę głosu 
* dostępność w lipcu (prosimy o wypisanie konkretnych dni) 

Zgłoszenia: 

Na maila: [aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com](mailto:aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com)

Tytuł: Animacja dubbing casting + nazwa roli (np. Mężczyzna 35-50 lat)

BARDZO proszę o przestrzeganie tytułowania maili. 

Zlecenie: płatne. 

Szczegóły projektu wyślemy wybranym osobom :)

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
✨ CASTING CALL – A PLACE NOT MINE ✨

💫 *"There must be a place where my heart isn't a burden."*

🎭 We are excited to announce casting for **A Place Not Mine**, an original fantasy musical about belonging, love, loss, and the things in life we cannot always avoid.

📍 Rehearsals: Middlesex University, London
🎟️ Performances: The Drayton Arms Theatre
📅 29 & 30 November 2026

💛 This is an independent, unpaid production. Should funding become available, any profits will be shared among the cast and creative team.

🌟 We are currently seeking performers aged **18–30** *(35 for Sylas)*, as well as members of our creative team.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎭 AVAILABLE ROLES

🖤 **RIVEN**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Riven (Winx Club)
🧠 Intelligent, withdrawn and emotionally guarded.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 *Reflection* – Mulan

💖 **SERAPHINE**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Glinda (Wicked)
✨ Bright, bubbly and seemingly perfect.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 *Once Upon a December* – Anastasia

☀️ **ORIS**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Olaf (Frozen)
😊 Loyal, optimistic and unintentionally funny.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 *This Wish* – Wish

🖤 **SYLAS**
🎂 Playing age: 25–35
📖 Character reference: Severus Snape (Harry Potter)
📚 Strict, intelligent and intimidating.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 *This Is The Thanks I Get?!* – Wish

🌲 **ROWAN**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Kristoff (Frozen)
😏 A sarcastic drama king who uses humour to survive awkward situations.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 Any Disney song

⚡ **ELARA**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Jade West (Victorious)
🗣️ Sharp, intelligent and never afraid to speak her mind.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 Any Disney song

🤍 **AURORA**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Mitchie Torres (Camp Rock)
🌷 Kind-hearted, supportive and emotionally open.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 Any Disney song

🌙 **SELENE**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Barbie (Barbie 2023)
💞 Sweet, energetic and slightly chaotic.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 Any Disney song

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎬 CREATIVE TEAM OPPORTUNITIES

We are also looking for:

🎭 DIRECTOR
✅ CHOREOGRAPHER – TAKEN
🎼 MUSICAL DIRECTOR

🎓 These positions are ideal for university students looking to expand their portfolio, gain practical experience, or complete placement requirements.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📩 HOW TO APPLY

Send us a DM on our Instagram page:

📱 @a.place.not.mine

🎥 Actors should submit a self-tape performing the requested audition song.

🌟 Successful applicants will receive an invitation to an in-person audition.

💫 We look forward to hearing from you.

🏡 *Find a place that's yours.*

May be an image of text that says 'NOVATERRA ACADEMY PRESENTS A PLACE NOT NE The Musical AN ORIGINAL FANTASYMUSICAL FANTASY MUSICAL ABOUT ABOUTBELONGING, BELONGING, LOVE, LOSSAND LOVE,LOSSAND LOSS AND THE THINGSI INLIFE HETHINGSINLIFE IN LIFE WECAN'T ALWAYS AVOID. items.title: ✨ CASTING CALL – A PLACE NOT MINE ✨

items.text:
Hello everyone! 

If you work in the arts, this is the skill that sets you apart.

**Level 1 British Sign Language (BSL)** is now enrolling for September - and places fill fast. Whether you’re on stage, on screen, or behind the scenes, BSL gives you a competitive edge, expands your casting potential, and helps you connect with D/deaf audiences and colleagues.

📍 **In‑person in Chelmsford, Essex**

Choose the time that fits your schedule:

• **Monday evenings: 7pm – 9pm**

• **Tuesday afternoons/evenings: 4:30pm – 6:30pm**

🎬 **See what Level 1 is all about:** Watch the intro video: [https://youtu.be/YDkgzezFOqE](https://youtu.be/YDkgzezFOqE)

✨ **Why join?**

• Stand out in auditions and casting calls

• Add a recognised qualification to your CV

• Learn in a warm, supportive environment

• Taught by **qualified, experienced Deaf tutors**

• Build confidence, communication skills, and inclusivity in your craft

Let’s keep moving forward together - **one sign at a time**.

Explore all BSL training opportunities at ecl.org/BSL** **

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Learn Level 1 British Sign Language Form sentences, have everyday conversations, and give and follow instructions in BSL. Starting 7 September 2026 -term time only. You can attend on either: Mondays -7-9pm •Tuesdays 4:30-6:30pm ECL, Ravensbourne Drive, Chelmsford, CM1 2SL. Free parking available on site. £585pp (includes exam fees). To secure your place you will be required to make α £100 non-refundable non deposit. Payment plan available. Find out more: 07780 234302 Deborah.Holden2@essexcares.org Signature リ. ecl Person Dentred pare'

items.title: Let's welcome our new members!

items.text:
Icons Week is coming 10th-14th August ArtsEd ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Join the amazing team at Perform Now and the incredible Diantè Lodge, Kerry Ellis, Ben Forster, Hannah Dimtsu, Jacosta Almgil, Ben Harris and Hannah Taylor for an iconic week of fun, intense and high standard training/workshops led by the best in the biz. 

From the West End to Broadway our iconic lineup have done it all!! 

BOOK NOW!!! 

https://performnow.co.uk/icons-summer-week

See you there!
#performnow #icons #youngperformers #londonmums #performanceopportunities

Icons Week is coming 10th-14th August ArtsEd ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Join the amazing team at Perform Now and the incredible Diantè Lodge, Kerry Ellis, Ben Forster, Hannah Dimtsu, Jacosta Almgil, Ben Harris and Hannah Taylor for an iconic week of fun, intense and high standard training/workshops led by the best in the biz. 

From the West End to Broadway our iconic lineup have done it all!! 

BOOK NOW!!! 

https://performnow.co.uk/icons-summer-week

See you there!
#performnow #icons #youngperformers #londonmums #performanceopportunities

items.text:
At Cherry Pips Acting, we specialise in TV & screen technique! 🎬

As well as self tape technique we also explore blocking movement for camera and shot types, for example a two shot or a tracking shot 🎥

We cultivate a space where young actors can explore, develop understanding and build confidence on camera! 💫

Want to know more about our classes & courses in Manchester or online?

📧 Send us an email today!

classes@mcaa.co.uk

#actingclass #cameratechniques #youngactors #screenacting

items.text:
People wanted to share their lived experience on bullying- £40 for 1 minute clip- preference if can be filmed in the next 24-48 hours

Male who experienced an eating disorder in their teens (can be any age now)

What is being filmed: I am making a video about bullying/harmful comments/discrimination on social media. I am making and funding this independently but it is linked to a charity I am launching to provide training and resources around young people’s mental health

If you're interested please comment (feel free to message me too but messages in requests folder don't always show)

EDIT: I have found someone for the first point so have removed it off this post- now just looking for a male who's experienced an eating disorder

✨ PERIWINKLE PRODUCTION PRIVATE LIMITED ✨
🎬 CASTING CALL – FEMALE DANCERS 💃

We are looking for talented, confident & energetic female dancers for exciting upcoming projects!

🌟 Films

🌟 Commercial Shoots

🌟 Music Videos

🌟 Live Events

📍 Location: Mumbai, India

📅 Contract Duration: 6 Months (Starting June 2026)

If you have passion, talent, and the confidence to shine on screen, this is your opportunity to be part of something big! 🔥

📩 Send your:

✔ CV / Profile

✔ Recent Photos & Dance Videos

✔ Contact Details

items.text:
🎬 MODELKA – WARSZAWA 🎬

Poszukujemy standinki/modelki do realizacji nowego filmu fabularnego.

📅 Termin: 13 czerwca 2026 r. (sobota)
📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa
💰 Stawka: 140 zł
⏱ Czas pracy: do 7 godzin

🔎 Wymagania:
• wiek 16–18 lat
• uroda słowiańska
• blond włosy
• ciemna oprawa oczu

ℹ️ Informacje dodatkowe:
• wizerunek oraz głos nie będą wykorzystywane w filmie
• doświadczenie nie jest wymagane

📧 Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy mailowo: ludzie@unagimedia.pl 

W tytule wiadomości wpisz: **MODELKA**

W treści maila prosimy o podanie:
• imienia i nazwiska
• wieku
• wzrostu
• aktualnego zdjęcia portretowego
• aktualnego zdjęcia sylwetki

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people and text that says 'CASTING WARSZAWA- POSZUKIWANIE modelki do realizacji nowego filmu fabularnego TERMIN: 3ezerwea LOKALIZACJA: Warszawa (sobota) STAWKA: 140zł zł CZAS CZASPRACY PRACY: do godzin WYMAGANIA: wiek 16-18 lat uroda astowiańska bland włosy ciemna oprawa oczu INFORMACJE DODATKOWE: wizerunek oraz glos będą wykorzystywanew filmie doświadczenie nie jest jest wymagane ZGŁOSZENIA RZYJMUJEMY MAILOWO: ludzie@unagimedia.pl ludzie TYTUŁ WIADOMOŚCI: MODELKA imic imic inazwiskp TREŚCI TREŚCIMAILA MAILA PROSIMY wiek PODANIE: wzrost zdjecie portretawe zdjęcie sylwetki Dolacz do naszego zespolu!'

items.text:
CASTING CALL – ACTION FEATURE FILM (UK SHOOT) 

Dear all, back again with a brand-new project. Kindly ensure this is not mixed up with my previous two projects which are still ongoing. 

We are now casting for an action film shooting in the UK from August/September (exact dates TBC). 

Theatrical worldwide release. 
Shoot Location: UK (exact location TBC). 
Day Rate: £300. 
Expenses covered. 
Shoot dates for each character will be confirmed soon. 

It is extremely important that you mention the CHARACTER NAME in the subject line of your email as I am working on multiple projects and this helps keep things organised. 

Please send a couple of photographs or a Spotlight link to farhan.baqi@mcccuk.co.uk as soon as possible. 

For all Romanian characters, actors must be Romanian or appear Romanian and be able to perform a Romanian accent. 

1 - Characters: MI-17 Captain – Male, Indian, Age 35–40. 

MI-17 Co-Pilot – Indian, Male, Age 35–40. 

2- Artur Kirstov – Russian, Male, Age 40–45 (Reference: Gary Oldman in Air Force One). 

3 - Borris – Russian, Male, Age 35–40. Tattoos piercing , muscular built would be great

4 - Hunter 1 – Male, Romanian, Early 30s. reference Stuntman or someone with Fighting experience. Tattoos piercing , muscular built would be  great. 

5 - Hunter 2 – Male, Romanian, Early 30s. reference Stuntman or someone with Fighting experience. Tattoos piercing , muscular built would be great

6 - Air Force Officer ATC – Indian, Male Age 30–35. 

Romanian mercenary – Romanian, younger than Boris and Artur 25 to 30. Tattoos piercing , muscular built would be great

Look forward to hearing as always. I have cast some great roles from this group so Thank you once again 🙂

Regards
FB
MCCC (London)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL**

SHORT FILM: "Forgive Me For What You'll Think"

Synopsis: ‘Alone in a church, a man attempts to confess his role in a tragedy, only to discover that judgment begins long before the truth is known...’

Role: Joseph
Looking for a Male aged 25–49. Joseph is emotionally restrained and conflicted. The performance relies on subtle shifts in thought and self-perception rather than displays of emotion

This role requires an actor capable of carrying a film through nuance, silence, and psychological complexity.

Production Details:
* Independent short film
* Filming in Derbyshire (Most likely Derby)
* One-day shoot
* Small crew (director and actor)
* **Unpaid Volenteer student production**
* Travel expenses will be paid if applicable

If interested, please submit:
* Headshot
* Acting CV (if available)
* Showreel (if available)

Selected applicants will be invited to submit a self-tape using a scene from the script.

Contact at:

mathiasgeorgiadis1@gmail.com

ASAP: shooting are soon 

Prague

An international financial company is casting for a commercial campaign

Role:  

Native polish-speaking and native Hebrew-speaking men

Important:  

Professional acting experience is not required

We are looking for the right look and the ability to speak confidently and clearly on camera

Profile:  

– Elegant, well-presented appearance  

– Natural authority and leadership energy  

– Intelligent and trustworthy presence  

– Strong communication skills and comfort in front of the camera

– Location: Prague

NOW CASTING!!!!! 

THIS COULD BE THE OPPORTUNITY OF A LIFETIME 

Have you ever dreamed of traveling the world, changing lives, and getting paid to tell incredible human stories?

We’re casting charismatic duos to become the faces of a major philanthropy YouTube channel, traveling across the globe and meeting people whose stories deserve to be seen and heard.

We’re looking for:

 Couples

 Best Friends

 Siblings

 Dynamic Duos

If you have amazing chemistry, a magnetic personality, a sense of adventure, and a genuine passion for helping others, we want to hear from you.

Apply at: MysticArt Pictures

#philanthropy #payitforward #TeamMystic #casting

If you have amazing chemistry, a magnetic personality, a sense of adventure, and a genuine passion for helping others, we want to hear from you.

Apply at: MysticArt Pictures

items.text:
**LAPLANDUK CASTING CALL - FATHER CHRISTMAS**  

LaplandUK are seeking performers to bring to life the pivotal role of Father Christmas.  

A warm, charismatic, and deeply believable embodiment of the beloved festive figure at the heart of the LaplandUK experience. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle.   

**ROLE DETAILS ** 
Father Christmas Pay: £20.50 per hour (training & live show)  
£50 daily subsidy per working day  
Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

**AUDITION DATES ** 
London (Camberley Theatre) 
Monday 8th – Friday 12th June  

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall) 
Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps. 

**LONDON** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-an…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Ascot-2026/125) 

**MANCHESTER** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Gr…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Manchester-2026/126) 

If you have any questions, please contact [eventhr@lapland.group](mailto:eventhr@lapland.group)

items.text:
🦖✨ THE ROARSOME DINO ADVENTURE IS COMING! ✨🦖

Step back in time for a Jurassic day of roar-some fun at The Grand! Join our friendly dinosaur palaeontologists and explore a prehistoric world packed with adventure, discovery, and dino magic!

Get creative with Dino mask making, dig for ancient treasures in the Dino fossil dig, and train to become a top explorer in Roar ranger training! Then enjoy the thrilling Dino show before dancing the day away at the Dino disco 🪩🦖

Meet our giant prehistoric friends up close in the magical Dinos meet and greet, and don’t forget to capture the moment at our photo opportunity!

📅 Sunday 12th July
📍 The Grand
💷 £10 per person

⏰ Session Times:
11:00am – 1:30pm
3:00pm – 5:30pm

A roar-some family adventure you won’t want to miss! 🌿🦖✨

items.previewTitle:
If you're interested, email us (see bio) with your CV and headshots!

Before It’s All Over is a new original comedy drama centring on four friends who, facing a number of issues ranging from dissertation deadlines, pushy parents, identity and self-destructive behaviour, learn that a meteorite is set to hit the Earth. Deciding to go out with a figurative bang before the literal one, they decide to finish out their lives with a final party.

items.text:
Z ogromną radością ogłaszamy nabór zgłoszeń do naszej pierwszej edycji festiwalu SoloStage! 

MASZ MONODRAM? Szukamy solowych spektakli, które przełamują schematy i pokazują siłę jednej osoby na scenie. 

Szczegóły:

Języki: angielski, ukraiński lub polski

Czas trwania: 15–50 minut

Termin: 3–4 października 2026 r. (specjalna pilotażowa edycja trwająca jeden weekend)

Tematyka: Społeczność, kreatywność i współpraca.

Czy chciałbyś wystąpić na scenie ze swoim solowym występem? Jeśli tak, czekamy na Twoją wiadomość! Tworzymy przestrzeń i społeczność, które pomogą Ci urzeczywistnić Twoją artystyczną wizję. 

​🔗 Zgłoś się tutaj: www.ettc.pl/SoloStage

📩 Skontaktuj się z nami i zostań częścią pierwszej pilotażowej edycji festiwalu!

sharedPost.text:
Oficjalne dokumenty bywają nudne, dlatego przygotowaliśmy nasz regulamin w pigułce! 📑🧐☀️🌴

Gwarantujemy w pełni bezpieczne i profesjonalne zasady: ocenia nas niezależne Jury powołane przez Artis Dea 🧑‍⚖️, Wasze dane są chronione zgodnie z RODO 🛡️, a na najlepszych czekają unikalne statuetki oraz dyplomy! 🏆📜

🗳️ I pamiętajcie o najważniejszym punkcie: nowym, w pełni zabezpieczonym przed manipulacjami Głosowaniu Publiczności! 👥💻 Wasi fani mogą na Was głosować natychmiast po Waszym zgłoszeniu, a zabawa trwa w najlepsze także po zamknięciu listy uczestników! Im szybciej Wasz film z dopiskiem „Magiczne Melodie” trafi do naszej bazy, tym dłuższą dacie sobie szansę na promocję i zdobycie tego wyjątkowego wyróżnienia! Nie czekajcie na ostatni dzwonek! 🚨💥

👉 Przeczytaj i kliknij „Wyślij”: https://wakacyjne-melodie.pl/
#WyśpiewajMarzenia2026 #WakacyjneMelodie #Regulamin #JasneZasady #MuzycznyKonkurs

WARSZAWA - ZOSTAŃ CZĘŚCIĄ WIDOWNI KULTOWEGO TELETURNIEJU!

Zapraszamy osoby polskojęzyczne w wieku 17-60 lat do udziału w nagraniach programu jako publiczność!

To świetna okazja, by zobaczyć telewizję od kulis, poczuć atmosferę prawdziwego planu zdjęciowego i przeżyć wyjątkową przygodę.

Terminy nagrań w czerwcu:
15, 16, 18, 19, 22

Wynagrodzenie: 100 zł gotówką po zakończeniu nagrania
Zgłoszenia:
https://forms.gle/WbMaogE36qVvmd4C6

Nie przegap okazji i dołącz do widowni kultowego teleturnieju!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '? To świetna okazja, by zobaczyć telewizję od kulis, poczuć atmosferę prawdziwego planu zdjęciowego przeżyć wyjątkową przygodę TERMINY NAGRAŃ w CZERWCU: 15, 16, 18, 19, 22 DOŁĄCZ DO WIDOWNI KULTOWEGO TELETURNIEJU! WYNAGRODZENIE: 100 zł gotówką po zakończeniu nagrania ZGŁOSZENIA: Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy wyłącznie przez formularz. NIE PRZEGAP OKAZJI DOŁĄCZ DO WIDOWNI KULTOWEGO TELETURNIEJU!'

items.text:
To those planning to audition on any date: please park in the rear of the church. OPAT is using the rectory (the rear, small auditorium) for our auditioning space- do not enter the chapel.

items.text:
**Looking for an iPhone Camera Operator**

Need someone for a one day shoot this Saturday (4 hours).

You'll be filming TikTok style content using:
* iPhone 17 Pro
* DJI wireless microphones
* Portable LED light

Equipment is provided. Just need an operator who knows how to move quickly, capture clean social content, and work comfortably with an iPhone setup.

Paid gig.

If interested, DM:
* Your experience shooting social content
* A few examples of your work

Location: Pasadena, CA
Date: Saturday
Duration: 4 hours
items.title: RECAP

topComments.text: Just DM’d you. I recently shot a social media video that got over 50 Million total combined views

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Spielfilm Großprojekt (Kinoformat) suchen wir noch Darsteller für kleinere Rollen, aber auch Komparsen, für Ritter, Dorfbewohner, Räuber, Schmied, Bauern. Ihr habt Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein, dann schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße an: harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald.

Viele Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

sharedPost.text:
COMMERCIAL – EXTRAS

We are looking for people of African, Middle Eastern, or Asian descent to appear as extras in a commercial.

For a disco club scene. Background dancers on the dance floor.

Non-featured role

Application links:

🔹 Women, ages 18–35
https://casting-app.pl/apply/bd8b3f416035459e9fc5575486e7f5e4

🔹 Men, ages 18–35
https://casting-app.pl/apply/32ada6ac0d8146109f81b26b125d2a3a

📍 Shooting date: June 16
📍 Location: Warsaw
📍 Shooting schedule: Daytime

💰 Rate: PLN 300 per shooting day (paid in cash after filming)

📸 Requirements: Well-groomed appearance
📩 Please apply only through the link provided under the role description.

sharedPost.text:
📢 POSZUKUJEMY BRACI BIOLOGICZNYCH DO PŁATNEGO BADANIA TECHNOLOGICZNEGO 📢

Poszukujemy biologicznych braci (rodzeństwa mężczyzn), którzy:

✅ ukończyli 31 lat,
✅ mają różnicę wieku nie większą niż 5 lat.

Udział polega na stacjonarnym teście technologicznym realizowanym w Warszawie (Praga-Południe). Badanie dotyczy oceny skuteczności nowej technologii.

📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa, Praga-Południe
⏱ Czas trwania: około 120 minut
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 285 zł dla każdej osoby, płatne przelewem przez firmę realizującą badanie
📅 Termin: do ustalenia (możliwe terminy już w czerwcu)

Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać na adres:
📧 impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com

W zgłoszeniu prosimy podać:
• numer telefonu do siebie i do brata,
• imię i nazwisko swoje oraz brata,
• aktualne zdjęcie każdej osoby biorącej udział w badaniu.

W temacie wiadomości prosimy wpisać:
„Badanie”.

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń!

sharedPost.text:
✨ Rouge Pole Showcase Gala está cada vez más cerca ✨¿Ya estás listo?

No solo será una noche llena de talento, fuerza, sensualidad y arte sobre el escenario… también estará acompañado por increíbles marcas aliadas que se suman para hacer de esta experiencia algo aún más especial. ❤️‍🔥

Gracias a cada marca por formar parte de esta gala, por apoyar el talento local y por compartir con nuestra comunidad regalos, stands, sorpresas y mucho cariño.

Nos vemos este 27 de junio en punto de las 6PM en The Reef Coco Beach para vivir juntas una noche inolvidable. Adquiere ya tus boletos 

Porque en Rouge, el espectáculo vuelve… y vuelve con todo. ✨

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL
We’re looking for three aspiring actors to help us create the perfect picture for the upcoming MAMM Festival!

Please check the images for further details :)

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'YOUTOPIA PROJECT TYPE: PRQJECTYPESHORTFILMMAMM21 SHORT FILM (MAMM21 OFFICIAL SELECTION) PRODUCTION PRODUCTIONTEAMEYOUTOPIA TEAM: OUTOPIA DIRECTOR: JUN LEE PRODUCER: PRODUCER:EUNCHE! EUNCHE LEE COMP COMPENSATION: HONORARIOUM+COPY. CREDIT, MEALS PROVIDED AUDITION/ METHOD: SELF-TAPE(FIRSTRO ELF-TAPE(FIRSTROUNDIHIN-PERSON CALLBACK (TBD) DEADLINE: JUNE 20,2026 EMAIL: SHORTFILMY SHORTFILMYOUTOPIA@GMAIL.COM OUTOPIA SUBJECT LINE FORMAT YOUTOPIA] ROLE NAME - NAME SHOOTING DATE: JULY 17 JULY 19'

May be a graphic of text that says 'SYNOPSIS An outsider immigrant actress in Vancouver, pushed to the absolute edge of financlal and psychologlcal survival. accepts a bizarre, high-paying transactional contract from an affluent matrlarch. Her assignment is not to act in a film, but to step Into real life and flawlessly embody the Identity of a deceased girl unde er rigid behavioral parameters. YOUTOPIA is a sterile, slow-burn psychological thriller that Interrogates the chilling boundarles between performance,class formance, class erasing, and raw human survival.'
May be an image of text
May be a graphic of text

May be a graphic of text that says 'JD Supporting Male 30s Any Ethnicity Description: Margaret's elegant, analytical associate who evaluates Soo not as a human belng, but as a high-stakes business commodity. Polished, sophisticated, and ruthlessly transactional, JD Is the quality-control Inspector of thls bizarre simulation. Every look he gives Soo silent, micro-appralsal her performance, calculating whether she yields a return on investment and driving her deeper into the caAe. Performance Note: Requires elite screen presence mastery over silent acting. Must be capable of generating intense, uncomfortable suspense through cold, critical glances and sharp demeanor.'

topComments.text:
Hey! Love to be considered for JD. Lots of pro acting experience doing various different roles!
-Richard

**CASTING CALL - FISHERMEN - NON-UNION COMMERCIAL**

**NO ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED!**

**SUBMISSION DEADLINE:** June 22, 2026 by 12pm

**CALLBACKS:** June 25 & 26, 2026

**WARDROBE:** July 6-7, 2026

**RATES:** $600/day

**1-YEAR BUYOUT RATE:** Between $2500-$4000 (dependent on if you appear in the final cut)

**FILMING:** July 9-15, 2026

**EXCLUSIVITY:** Automotive

Paid casting call in Chicago searching for male actor and Child actors!
Thanks everyone! We are DePaul directing major MFA students, doing our master degree thesis short film. 

Please let me know if you are interested or know anyone! Paid. 

COMPENSATION : Paid / Stipend + Meals + Credit + Copy

SHOOT DATES: July 17-27,2026 (specific dates depend on role)

Email us: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of macrame and text

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL KNOTS SEEKING PIETRO Male, late 30s-mid 40s For a student thesis short fil Pietro is the father of Sebastian and Samuel. Tired, loving, and overwhelmed, he is trying to hold the family together on the day th leave for Italy. He is practical caring, but emotionally stretch thin. Looking for an actor with warmth, restraint, and a grounded presence. Shoot Dates: day between July 17-27 Location: Chicago area Compensation: Paid, stipend copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self-tape to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL SEEKING: SEBASTIAN For Male, student thesis short film Sebastian. Quiet, guarded, and emotionally mature in some ways, but still very much child. On the day his family is leaving for Italy, he secretly sets out to visit his mother' grave before too late. He loves deeply, but he hides everything behind silence, distance, and anger. Looking for an actor who can carry emotion through stillness, looks, and small behavior. Shoot Dates: days between July 17-27 Location: area Compensation: Paid stipend +copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com (For minors, submissions must come from parent/guardian.)'

CASTING CALL FOR THE FULL MONTY. 

We are urgently looking for an actor of black/Asian decent to play Horse in our upcoming production of The Full Monty at the Louth Riverhead Theatre in sept. Our show is at risk of being cancelled if we can't find someone in the next week or so. Doesn't have to be Louth based but will need to get to some rehearsals and be available show week 8-12th September. Please get in touch urgently if anyone knows of anyone. This is an unpaid role. 

P.S the ad below says 40+ but could work with younger (around 25+)

items.text:
# **Acting Headshot Day in Manchester**

Hi everyone,

I've had a number of enquiries from performers in and around Manchester, so I'm putting together an acting headshot day over the next couple of weeks.

I'll be working with a limited number of actors on the day to keep each session creative and tailored - with a focus on creating a range of strong, castable looks.

There are a couple of places left, so if you're based in Manchester (or regularly travel there) and are due a headshot update or looking to expand your casting range, feel free to comment below or send me a DM for details.

[https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk](https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk)

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL: MISS LONELYHEART'S MEMORY LIGHT - DENVER BASED FEATURE FILM!

Hello, my name is Rowan Harper and I am a recent graduate of CU Denver's Film and Television department. I am producing a feature film for a local filmmaker and we are looking for a wide variety of strong roles! All details below 👇

Longline: An 8-year-old girl with PTSD runs away from a foster home to confront her violent, deadbeat dad, and to piece together the fractured memory of her mother’s death.

Roles: 

Kid (A.K.A Grace) - Lead, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 6 - 12: A resilient and insightful child navigating the trauma of her mother’s death. She is described as being "wise beyond her years" with a premature sadness that defines her character. Kid suffers from undiagnosed PTSD, which manifests physically through stress-induced incontinence. Her primary companions are eight Tamagotchi virtual pets that she tends to as emotional lifelines.

Miss. Lonelyheart (Nonie Corazon) - Lead, Female, Hispanic/Latino, Age 60 - 90: An eccentric, unkempt recluse living in a decaying apartment building. She was displaced from Denver’s Auraria neighborhood during the 1970s Urban Renewal Program, a history that colors her reclusive nature. She is the owner of the "memory light," a magical analog device she uses to revisit her past.

Johnny Taylor - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 40 - 60: Kid’s estranged father, recently out on parole and living in a dismal apartment. He is a Gulf War veteran (Operation Desert Storm) whose combat-induced PTSD contributes to a "vacant, mean meekness" and history of explosive violence. While he loves his daughter, he is "hollowed out" by instability and unable to provide the care she needs.

Wanda Howell - Supporting, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 20 - 50: Johnny’s girlfriend. She is a tough, chain-smoker with an "edgy energy" who wears cheap polyester clothing. Despite her flawed exterior, she is "unexpectedly kind" and serves as a vital anchor for Kid during moments of emotional free fall.

Samantha Dander - Supporting, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 20 - 35: A mousy and soft-spoken social worker who lives in the same building as Nonie. She is perennially dateless and lives in a dimly lit apartment filled with cats. She is an observant neighbor who becomes a hesitant witness to Kid's journey.

Otis - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 60 - 80: A homeless blues guitarist who lives in a cardboard box outside Nonie’s building. Despite his living situation, he is remarkably clean and wears a white suit. He is observant and protective of his neighbors, often serving as a rhythmic "chorus" for the building’s activities - MUST BE PROFICIENT AT GUITAR 

Bruno - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 40 - 60: The stubby superintendent and doorman of the apartment building. He is described as a "lazy, unpleasant package" who frequently clashes with Otis over property boundaries. Despite his aggressive demeanor, he is highly sensitive regarding his mother and struggles with his own feelings of isolation.

We are also looking for a smattering of bit parts, day players, ensemble and chorus roles. Please lease please consider those too. Email rowanharper386@gmail.com for any applications or questions. We are shooting July 13th - August 8th in Denver and Arvada Colorado. We will be flexible with your schedule. This project is non-union.

items.summary:
URGENT CASTING CALL: MISS LONELYHEART'S MEMORY LIGHT - DENVER BASED FEATURE FILM!

Hello, my name is Rowan Harper and I am a recent graduate of CU Denver's Film and Television department. I am producing a feature film for a local filmmaker and we are looking for a wide variety of strong roles! All details below 👇

Longline: An 8-year-old girl with PTSD runs away from a foster home to confront her violent, deadbeat dad, and to piece together the fractured memory of her mother’s death.

Roles: 

Kid (A.K.A Grace) - Lead, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 6 - 12: A resilient and insightful child navigating the trauma of her mother’s death. She is described as being "wise beyond her years" with a premature sadness that defines her character. Kid suffers from undiagnosed PTSD, which manifests physically through stress-induced incontinence. Her primary companions are eight Tamagotchi virtual pets that she tends to as emotional lifelines.

Miss. Lonelyheart (Nonie Corazon) - Lead, Female, Hispanic/Latino, Age 60 - 90: An eccentric, unkempt recluse living in a decaying apartment building. She was displaced from Denver’s Auraria neighborhood during the 1970s Urban Renewal Program, a history that colors her reclusive nature. She is the owner of the "memory light," a magical analog device she uses to revisit her past.

Johnny Taylor - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 40 - 60: Kid’s estranged father, recently out on parole and living in a dismal apartment. He is a Gulf War veteran (Operation Desert Storm) whose combat-induced PTSD contributes to a "vacant, mean meekness" and history of explosive violence. While he loves his daughter, he is "hollowed out" by instability and unable to provide the care she needs.

Wanda Howell - Supporting, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 20 - 50: Johnny’s girlfriend. She is a tough, chain-smoker with an "edgy energy" who wears cheap polyester clothing. Despite her flawed exterior, she is "unexpectedly kind" and serves as a vital anchor for Kid during moments of emotional free fall.

Samantha Dander - Supporting, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 20 - 35: A mousy and soft-spoken social worker who lives in the same building as Nonie. She is perennially dateless and lives in a dimly lit apartment filled with cats. She is an observant neighbor who becomes a hesitant witness to Kid's journey.

Otis - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 60 - 80: A homeless blues guitarist who lives in a cardboard box outside Nonie’s building. Despite his living situation, he is remarkably clean and wears a white suit. He is observant and protective of his neighbors, often serving as a rhythmic "chorus" for the building’s activities - MUST BE PROFICIENT AT GUITAR 

Bruno - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 40 - 60: The stubby superintendent and doorman of the apartment building. He is described as a "lazy, unpleasant package" who frequently clashes with Otis over property boundaries. Despite his aggressive demeanor, he is highly sensitive regarding his mother and struggles with his own feelings of isolation.

We are also looking for a smattering of bit parts, day players, ensemble and chorus roles. Please lease please consider those too. Email rowanharper386@gmail.com for any applications or questions. We are shooting July 13th - August 8th in Denver and Arvada Colorado. We will be flexible with your schedule. This project is non-union.
items.title: URGENT CASTING CALL: MISS LONELYHEART'S MEMORY LIGHT - DENVER BASED FEATURE FILM!

items.text:
Providing an update for my film project "Call Center"

Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - [ROLE NAME] - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Keisha: Female, 30-45. Black or Hispanic/Latina.**

Headstrong, sharp-tongued, stylish, and not afraid to curse someone out when necessary. She’s like a big sister to Kenneth as she understands he does have issues with his mental illnesses and tried to be his anchor to calm him down when needed. Keisha designs clothes, accessories, and trinkets that she sells to local mom-and-pop stores. Her long-term goal is to become a successful designer whose work is sold in major department store chains.

**Tone:** Bold, funny, confident, protective, blunt.

2.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous. Bisexual.**The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. When she talks about her machinations she tends to get tunnel vision as she treats her creations like her own children she is proud of. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

3.      **Derek**: **Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

The department manager. Derek is positive, supportive, and genuinely wants his team to succeed. He tries to keep the department moving forward while managing strong personalities, office politics, and workplace chaos.

**Tone:** Supportive manager, patient, professional, quietly funny.

**4.      Customer (Voice role): Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

Calling into customer support and speaks with Kenneth. Is angry and hostile as he has a technical support problem that he wants fixed not now, but “Right Now”. Has a verbal back and forth with the lead character Kenneth as he tries to resolve the issue.

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks. 

Shooting Schedule: Planning for the 2nd-3rd weekend of July. 2 day 10 hour shoot.

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.

items.text:
# **[KRAKÓW] CASTING NA PROWADZĄCEGO / WSPÓŁTWÓRCĘ PODCASTU WIDEO**

Szukam charyzmatycznego prowadzącego do autorskiego podcastu w Krakowie. Ty dostarczasz wizerunek, wiedzę i pomysł, ja zapewniam pełne zaplecze produkcyjne. Szukam partnera, a nie klienta do wynajęcia studia.

Jesteś aktorem/aktorką, świetnie czujesz się przed kamerą i masz nienaganną dykcję, ale oprócz tego masz unikalną wiedzę, pasję (niekoniecznie związaną z aktorstwem!) i znasz swoją niszę od podszewki? Świetnie. Ja dysponuję w Krakowie w pełni wyposażonym, profesjonalnym studiem wideo (wielokamerowy system na pełnoklatkowych aparatach Lumix, miksery ATEM, profesjonalne oświetlenie) oraz twardym technicznym know-how.

Połączmy te dwa kapitały. Stwórzmy format oparty na idealnej synergii i bezkompromisowej jakości.

**Jak wygląda nasz podział ról?**
* **Twoja działka (Wizerunek, Charyzma i Merytoryka):** Jesteś twarzą, głosem i mózgiem operacyjnym w kwestii treści. Wykorzystujesz swój warsztat przed kamerą, ale wchodzisz do studia i skupiasz się wyłącznie na tym, w czym jesteś absolutnym ekspertem. Zapraszasz wartościowych gości, prowadzisz rozmowy, dzielisz się wiedzą i budujesz społeczność wokół formatu.
* **Moja działka (Technologia i Zaplecze):** Pełnię rolę Twojego technicznego wspólnika i producenta. Biorę na siebie 100% procesów realizacyjnych. Odpowiadam za wielokamerową realizację obrazu, zaawansowany montaż i profesjonalną obróbkę dźwięku (DaVinci Resolve). Wycinam z naszych nagrań dynamiczne formaty pionowe (TikTok, Reels, Shorts), optymalizuję je i ogarniam techniczną stronę dystrybucji.

**Model biznesowy (Zasady 50/50):** Gramy do jednej bramki. Nie płacisz mi z góry za wynajem studia ani za montaż. Budujemy wspólne przedsięwzięcie i dzielimy się zyskami z monetyzacji (przychody z YouTube, wsparcie od widzów przez Patronite, kontrakty sponsorskie, lokowania, a w przyszłości własne produkty) dokładnie po połowie. Dzielimy ryzyko i dzielimy sukces.

Zależy mi na osobie, która podchodzi do biznesu z pełnym profesjonalizmem, ma na siebie konkretny pomysł i potrafi konsekwentnie działać. Żeby sprawdzić nasze biznesowe dopasowanie i chemię przed kamerą, zrobimy na start 4-odcinkowy sezon pilotażowy (Proof of Concept). Zobaczymy, jak współpracuje nam się w praktyce.

**CZEGO WYMAGAM NA START (Przeczytaj uważnie):**

Jeśli widzisz w tym potencjał, wyślij mi wiadomość prywatną. Oczekuję jednak maksymalnego konkretu. Twoja aplikacja musi precyzyjnie i w szczegółach opisywać:
1. **Format i tematykę:** Jaki dokładnie podcast chcesz prowadzić i do kogo docelowo ma trafiać?
2. **Twarde kompetencje:** Dlaczego to właśnie Ty masz o tym mówić? Samo wykształcenie aktorskie to za mało – wymagam jasnego potwierdzenia ekspertyzy w wybranym temacie (poparte dowodami: doświadczenie zawodowe, zrealizowane projekty, konkretne zainteresowania).
3. **Bazę gości:** Czy masz własną sieć kontaktów, znajomych lub współpracowników z danej branży, których od razu będziesz w stanie zaprosić do udziału w projekcie w charakterze gości?

**Ważna uwaga na koniec:** Szanujmy swój czas. Jeśli Twoja wiadomość nie będzie precyzyjna i zabraknie w niej szczegółów dotyczących Twojego pomysłu, kompetencji oraz konkretnego zakresu działania – nie odpiszę.

Czekam na profesjonalne propozycje na priv.

items.summary:
# **[KRAKÓW] CASTING NA PROWADZĄCEGO / WSPÓŁTWÓRCĘ PODCASTU WIDEO**

Szukam charyzmatycznego prowadzącego do autorskiego podcastu w Krakowie. Ty dostarczasz wizerunek, wiedzę i pomysł, ja zapewniam pełne zaplecze produkcyjne. Szukam partnera, a nie klienta do wynajęcia studia.

Jesteś aktorem/aktorką, świetnie czujesz się przed kamerą i masz nienaganną dykcję, ale oprócz tego masz unikalną wiedzę, pasję (niekoniecznie związaną z aktorstwem!) i znasz swoją niszę od podszewki? Świetnie. Ja dysponuję w Krakowie w pełni wyposażonym, profesjonalnym studiem wideo (wielokamerowy system na pełnoklatkowych aparatach Lumix, miksery ATEM, profesjonalne oświetlenie) oraz twardym technicznym know-how.

Połączmy te dwa kapitały. Stwórzmy format oparty na idealnej synergii i bezkompromisowej jakości.

**Jak wygląda nasz podział ról?**
* **Twoja działka (Wizerunek, Charyzma i Merytoryka):** Jesteś twarzą, głosem i mózgiem operacyjnym w kwestii treści. Wykorzystujesz swój warsztat przed kamerą, ale wchodzisz do studia i skupiasz się wyłącznie na tym, w czym jesteś absolutnym ekspertem. Zapraszasz wartościowych gości, prowadzisz rozmowy, dzielisz się wiedzą i budujesz społeczność wokół formatu.
* **Moja działka (Technologia i Zaplecze):** Pełnię rolę Twojego technicznego wspólnika i producenta. Biorę na siebie 100% procesów realizacyjnych. Odpowiadam za wielokamerową realizację obrazu, zaawansowany montaż i profesjonalną obróbkę dźwięku (DaVinci Resolve). Wycinam z naszych nagrań dynamiczne formaty pionowe (TikTok, Reels, Shorts), optymalizuję je i ogarniam techniczną stronę dystrybucji.

**Model biznesowy (Zasady 50/50):** Gramy do jednej bramki. Nie płacisz mi z góry za wynajem studia ani za montaż. Budujemy wspólne przedsięwzięcie i dzielimy się zyskami z monetyzacji (przychody z YouTube, wsparcie od widzów przez Patronite, kontrakty sponsorskie, lokowania, a w przyszłości własne produkty) dokładnie po połowie. Dzielimy ryzyko i dzielimy sukces.

Zależy mi na osobie, która podchodzi do biznesu z pełnym profesjonalizmem, ma na siebie konkretny pomysł i potrafi konsekwentnie działać. Żeby sprawdzić nasze biznesowe dopasowanie i chemię przed kamerą, zrobimy na start 4-odcinkowy sezon pilotażowy (Proof of Concept). Zobaczymy, jak współpracuje nam się w praktyce.

**CZEGO WYMAGAM NA START (Przeczytaj uważnie):**

Jeśli widzisz w tym potencjał, wyślij mi wiadomość prywatną. Oczekuję jednak maksymalnego konkretu. Twoja aplikacja musi precyzyjnie i w szczegółach opisywać:
1. **Format i tematykę:** Jaki dokładnie podcast chcesz prowadzić i do kogo docelowo ma trafiać?
2. **Twarde kompetencje:** Dlaczego to właśnie Ty masz o tym mówić? Samo wykształcenie aktorskie to za mało – wymagam jasnego potwierdzenia ekspertyzy w wybranym temacie (poparte dowodami: doświadczenie zawodowe, zrealizowane projekty, konkretne zainteresowania).
3. **Bazę gości:** Czy masz własną sieć kontaktów, znajomych lub współpracowników z danej branży, których od razu będziesz w stanie zaprosić do udziału w projekcie w charakterze gości?

**Ważna uwaga na koniec:** Szanujmy swój czas. Jeśli Twoja wiadomość nie będzie precyzyjna i zabraknie w niej szczegółów dotyczących Twojego pomysłu, kompetencji oraz konkretnego zakresu działania – nie odpiszę.

Czekam na profesjonalne propozycje na priv.

items.text:
🎙️ SZUKAM GŁOSU!

Nagrywam podcast o Italii — tej prawdziwej, tej przeżytej na własnej skórze, z humorem, z językowymi wpadkami, z kuriozalnymi sytuacjami, z lokalnym kolorytem, śmiechem i zapachem espresso o poranku.

Szukam kobiety z uśmiechem w głosie, z głosem, który ekscytuje, zaciekawia, przyciąga. Kogoś, kto umie opowiadać nie tylko słowami, ale też melodią głosu.

🎧 To będzie podcast pełen życia. Chcę, żeby słuchacze czuli się, jakby siedzieli ze mną w Neapolu przy kawie i słuchali historii, których nie ma w przewodnikach.

🎤 Planowana sesja nagraniowa: 5 - 12 lipca.

Projekt jest komercyjny – oferuję wynagrodzenie dla lektorki. ( 1000 zł za pracę,  a po montażu przed publikacją dodatkowe wynagrodzenie - umowa ) 

Jeśli czujesz, że masz to coś w głosie, daj znać. 

Napisz 📆 wiadomość prywatną lub komentarz.

Moje podróże są na instagramie: @WYCIECZKO

items.title: 💰 BARDZO ATRAKCYJNA STAWKA ZA 1 DZIEŃ W PROGRAMIE TV! 💰

items.text:
CREATIVE SUPPORT CIRCLE

A Psychology & Personal Growth Workshop for Artists, Performers and Creatives

Being creative can be exciting, meaningful and deeply fulfilling.

It can also be isolating.

Many artists, performers, freelancers and creative professionals experience self-doubt, burnout, creative blocks, performance anxiety, uncertainty and the pressure of constantly creating while trying to build a sustainable life.

Creative Support Circle is a supportive space where creatives can explore these challenges together in a respectful and confidential environment.

This introductory workshop is designed for people who create, perform, teach, write, build projects or simply want to reconnect with their creativity and personal growth.

Through guided discussion, reflection and practical psychological tools, participants will have the opportunity to better understand themselves, connect with others facing similar challenges and develop healthier ways of navigating the creative journey.

WHAT TO EXPECT

• Guided discussions and reflection

• Practical psychological insights and tools

• Conversations about creativity, motivation and well-being

• A supportive and respectful group environment

• Connection with fellow artists, performers and creatives

• An opportunity to help shape future workshops based on the group's needs

FACILITATED BY

Begüm Karausta, MA Clinical Psychologist

Begüm Karausta is a Clinical Psychologist based in Warsaw with experience supporting both international and Polish clients.

Alongside her private practice, she works with employees of major organizations across Poland, helping people navigate life transitions, workplace challenges, relationships, emotional well-being and personal development.

Her approach combines professional psychological knowledge with practical tools that participants can apply in everyday life.

WHO IS THIS FOR?

• Artists

• Comedians

• Actors

• Musicians

• Writers

• Facilitators

• Creative entrepreneurs

• Freelancers

• Performers

• Anyone seeking personal growth while pursuing a creative path

WORKSHOP DETAILS

📅 Monday, July 6

🕔 17:00 – 19:00

📍 Praga Południe, Warsaw

(Exact address shared after registration)

LIMITED TO 10 PARTICIPANTS

To ensure a meaningful and high-quality experience, this workshop is intentionally limited to 10 participants only.

The small-group format allows everyone to actively participate, be heard and benefit from deeper discussion and interaction

IMPORTANT

This workshop is intended for education, personal growth and community support.

It is not psychotherapy, psychological treatment or a healthcare service.

A space to reflect.

A space to connect.

A space to grow.

@impactwarsaw

impactwarsaw.com

items.summary:
CREATIVE SUPPORT CIRCLE

A Psychology & Personal Growth Workshop for Artists, Performers and Creatives

Being creative can be exciting, meaningful and deeply fulfilling.

It can also be isolating.

Many artists, performers, freelancers and creative professionals experience self-doubt, burnout, creative blocks, performance anxiety, uncertainty and the pressure of constantly creating while trying to build a sustainable life.

Creative Support Circle is a supportive space where creatives can explore these challenges together in a respectful and confidential environment.

This introductory workshop is designed for people who create, perform, teach, write, build projects or simply want to reconnect with their creativity and personal growth.

Through guided discussion, reflection and practical psychological tools, participants will have the opportunity to better understand themselves, connect with others facing similar challenges and develop healthier ways of navigating the creative journey.

WHAT TO EXPECT

• Guided discussions and reflection

• Practical psychological insights and tools

• Conversations about creativity, motivation and well-being

• A supportive and respectful group environment

• Connection with fellow artists, performers and creatives

• An opportunity to help shape future workshops based on the group's needs

FACILITATED BY

Begüm Karausta, MA Clinical Psychologist

Begüm Karausta is a Clinical Psychologist based in Warsaw with experience supporting both international and Polish clients.

Alongside her private practice, she works with employees of major organizations across Poland, helping people navigate life transitions, workplace challenges, relationships, emotional well-being and personal development.

Her approach combines professional psychological knowledge with practical tools that participants can apply in everyday life.

WHO IS THIS FOR?

• Artists

• Comedians

• Actors

• Musicians

• Writers

• Facilitators

• Creative entrepreneurs

• Freelancers

• Performers

• Anyone seeking personal growth while pursuing a creative path

WORKSHOP DETAILS

📅 Monday, July 6

🕔 17:00 – 19:00

📍 Praga Południe, Warsaw

(Exact address shared after registration)

LIMITED TO 10 PARTICIPANTS

To ensure a meaningful and high-quality experience, this workshop is intentionally limited to 10 participants only.

The small-group format allows everyone to actively participate, be heard and benefit from deeper discussion and interaction

IMPORTANT

This workshop is intended for education, personal growth and community support.

It is not psychotherapy, psychological treatment or a healthcare service.

A space to reflect.

A space to connect.

A space to grow.

@impactwarsaw

impactwarsaw.com

https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk

items.previewDescription: 12.06.2026 - Herbert Krautwurm ist ein bekannter, zertifizierter Kellergassenführer und ein echtes „Original“ aus dem niederösterreichischen Pulkautal. Er engagiert sich leidenschaftlich für die Erhaltung, Renovierung und Belebung der traditionellen...

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören 

Herbert Krautwurm ist ein bekannter, zertifizierter Kellergassenführer und ein echtes „Original“ aus dem niederösterreichischen Pulkautal. Er engagiert sich leidenschaftlich für die Erhaltung, Renovierung und Belebung der traditionellen Weinkultur im Weinviertel. Wofür er bekannt ist, darüber sprach Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs mit diesem Unikat.

items.title: Garmi me mango Jush ,,,

items.text:
THE BIGGEST MISTAKE WITH ACTING CLASSES YOU NEED TO KNOW
There’s a common problem in most acting training that no one really talks about.
And it’s what keeps a lot of actors STUCK for years, wasting time and money.

Most acting training focuses on FEEDBACK.

But feedback doesn’t make you a consistently better actor.

I was explaining this to an actor recently using a simple analogy.

If you’re trying to shoot a basketball into a hoop and you keep missing, it doesn’t help if someone just says “closer,” “more energy,” or “that wasn’t it.” 

What you need is the TECHNIQUE behind how to consistently get the ball through the hoop.

Acting is no different.

Actors don’t become bookable from one-off feedback.

Actors become bookable when they’re trained in a skill set that enables them to be exactly what casting directors are looking for in every audition.

For context, I’ve been working as an actor for 18 years across film, television, and stage.

My credits include series regular roles in two Netflix productions, six feature films in lead roles, Jersey Boys directed by Clint Eastwood, and Wendy Darling in ABC’s Once Upon a Time.

I’ve taken what works in practice and developed a structured approach that builds CONFIDENCE, CONSISTENCY, and ultimately leads to BOOKING work. 

I’m curious. Is this something you’ve noticed about acting classes too? Let me know in the comments below.👇🏻 

DM me “ACTING” if you’re putting in the work but not seeing consistent results, and want to understand the simple technique that gets you booked. 📩

Casting call in Berlin 

We’re currently looking for 3 talents for an upcoming lifestyle / UGC shoot:
• Indian woman (20–35)
• Indian man (25–45)
• Native English-speaking blonde/light hair woman (20–35)

No acting experience required - just natural energy and comfort in front of the camera. The shoot is relaxed, authentic, and focused on short-form content.

Interested applicants, please send an email with a few recent photos, casting form and your Instagram profile to the **marianna.vesku@nymph.so**

items.text:
Das neue Streaming Bundle für Unter uns Fans #unteruns #hbomax #rtl+ #rtlplus 

https://youtube.com/shorts/sRtW50ssRrA 

Mein Moment im Büroloft von „Unter uns“

Diese Woche durfte ich bei „Unter uns“ in den @mmcstudios Köln als Nebenrollendarsteller mit Text vor der Kamera stehen. Die Szene spielte im Büroloft zwischen Huber & Huber Bauvision und Goldberg Superior Cologne. Mehr darf ich nicht verraten.

@actpm Patrick Müller als Tobias Lassner

Patrick verkörpert seit 2006 Tobias Lassner, einen erfolgreichen Anwalt mit kühler Fassade und weichem Kern. Seine Verbindung zu Leo macht diese Figur besonders menschlich und erzählerisch stark im Ensemble.

@miriam_lahnstein Miriam Lahnstein als Patrizia Neumann-Goldberg

Miriam spielt Patrizia Neumann-Goldberg, eine selbstbewusste Unternehmerin mit Machtinstinkt, Charme und Konsequenz. Als Mutter von Stella verkörpert sie Kontrolle, Ehrgeiz und familiäre Spannung mit großer Präsenz vor der Kamera.

@harun.yildirim_official Harun Yildirim als Ferhat Gülek

Harun spielt Ferhat Gülek, Architekt, Vater von Baris und Esma sowie Noch-Ehemann von Dana. Seine Figur bringt Charme, Lebensfreude und emotionale Bewegung in die Serie und in die Schillerallee hinein.

Wertschätzung am Set

Besonders wertvoll war das ruhige, respektvolle Miteinander der UFA-Produktion. In den MMC Studios Köln spürt man Präzision, Vertrauen, Timing und Teamgeist hinter jeder Szene und jedem gemeinsamen Moment am Set.

Jetzt ansehen und dranbleiben

Wenn Ihr „Unter uns“ verfolgt, achtet gern auf diese Figuren. Die Serie läuft jeden Abend bei @rtl_de und ist auf @rtlplus streambar. Teil 2 findet Ihr im Kanal von @sandras.social.media.creation (Sandra Wötzel) zum Weiterlesen.

Christian Weiße aka @christian_weisse_digi_content

#UnterUns #RTL #RTLPlus #UFASerialDrama #MMCStudios

☠️ Listen up, ya landlubbers...

We're buildin' a cast. We're buildin' a crew. And we're buildin' a movie.

If you've ever wanted to act, run camera, make content, tell stories, or just be part of somethin' bigger than yourself...

Now's the time to climb aboard.

🎬 Tomorrow • 6:30 PM
📍 Colorado Media School

4380 S Syracuse St Suite 400, Denver, CO 80237

No fancy Hollywood nonsense.

Just good people makin' movies.

🌐 https://movieteam.site/

The tide waits for no pirate.

topComments.text: To say I'm excited would be an understatement. Opportunities like this are the reason I get out of bed in the morning. I love bringing ideas to life, solving creative problems, and helping people tell their stories. I'm energized by the possibility of contributing and can't wait to see where this adventure leads. Follow https://www.instagram.com/dirtypirateproductions/
Hi Hollie. Since we just found out about this is there another day or time for auditions besides tomorrow night? Morning? Or later this week?

**OPEN CASTING CALL -  LOS ANGELES**

**SAG & Non-Union Feature Film.**

**We are making a film about the people who show up for others.**

**SEEKING: **

**African American Male & Female. 18 to 60**

**Asian Male.  32 to 45**

**Latino Male. 18 to 30 White **

**Male & Female. 40 to 60**

**Los Angeles locals only. **

**Filming July 13 – August 28. SAG $810 / 8hrs — Non-Union $200 / 10hrs**

**Submit now at ****[now@civlzn.com](mailto:now@civlzn.com)**** **

[https://www.instagram.com/civlzn/](https://www.instagram.com/civlzn/)

**Subject line: DECISION**

**Include:  Name -  Phone number - City / neighborhood - Photo — phone camera fine, no filters, no sunglasses, no hats -Union if any**

**Roles filling now.**

**production: **

www.armoredpictures.com

[https://www.instagram.com/armoredpictures.la/](https://www.instagram.com/armoredpictures.la/)

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Spielfilm Großprojekt (Kinoformat) suchen wir noch Darsteller für kleinere Rollen, aber auch Komparsen, für Ritter, Dorfbewohner, Räuber, Schmied, Bauern. Ihr habt Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein, dann schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße an: harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald.

Viele Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

We’re looking for new faces to join a Bollywood film project – Project 79 filming in Coventry on 16th June 2026.

👥 Male & Female

📅 Age: 18–55 | 📅 16th of June

📍 Coventry

🚌 Birmingham pickup and drop-off available

💷 Paid role

items.text:
🎥 CASTING CALL – ROOM FOR THOUGHT 🎥 TRAVEL EXPENSES COVERED ONLY 

We're looking for men and women to take part in the very first episode of **Room For Thought**, a brand-new social discussion series exploring real opinions, experiences, and perspectives.

🗣️ Episode Topic:
**Men vs Women: Can We Ever Understand Each Other?**

Participants will respond to thought-provoking statements such as:

• "Men have it harder in modern dating."
• "Women are judged more harshly by society."
• "Men are expected to hide their emotions."
• "Dating apps have made relationships worse."
• "Men and women can never truly understand each other."

This isn't about arguing or "winning" a debate. It's about having honest conversations, challenging perspectives, and finding common ground.

We're looking for:
✅ Men and women aged 18+
✅ Strong opinions and life experiences
✅ People comfortable sharing their views on camera
✅ Respectful and open-minded individuals

📍 London / Essex
🎥 Filmed for YouTube and social media
📅 28th June 2026

Interested?

Send us a DM with:
• Name
• Age
• Location
• A little bit about yourself
• Why you'd like to take part

All viewpoints are welcome.

Join the conversation.

#RoomForThought #CastingCall #MenVsWomen #SocialExperiment #Discussion #London #Essex #YouTube #Debate #Community

items.text:
Casting Call: Athletic Female Model/Actress (18–30)
Location: Ontario, CA (or relatively close)

Shoot Date: June 18, 19 or 20th 

Compensation: $100 for 3-4 hours of work, plus any meals/snacks -- not negotiable

I am reshooting a project and I have an immediate need to cast a physically fit or athletic female model/actress (18–30) for an educational video project that will be shown to junior/community college students at a school in Southern California. This short-form documentary aims to explore the real-life accessibility and lifestyle challenges faced during a temporary injury requiring the use of crutches and a fiberglass splint and/or cast on the leg.

About the Role:

You’ll portray an individual recovering from a temporary lower-limb injury, navigating public spaces and day-to-day activities. Scenes may include attempting to use stairs, accessing public buildings, malls, shopping, navigating campus hallways, and more—while using crutches and a medical-grade cast/splint (provided). The shoot will be filmed in one day in 3-4 hours, but crafted to look like multiple days.

Ideal Candidate:

• Female, 18–30 years old

• Athletic, active, or fitness-oriented (to contrast with sudden mobility loss)

• Based in the greater Los Angeles area 

• Comfortable with physical activity on crutches

• Natural presence on camera; able to convey authentic emotion

• Will be required to bring different outfits shoes, and a few different items (backpack, etc), but the cast/splint and crutches are provided.

• Prior modeling or acting experience is a plus, but not required

• Prior injury experience, experience with crutches and/or a cast is also a plus, but not required

Project Highlights:

• Educational, socially conscious content

• Documentary-style, mostly improvised lines, with some lines and general content provided

• Produced for classroom use to foster empathy and accessibility awareness

• Safe, supportive environment with clear direction and assistance

• Ability to get creative and add to this project based on your past experience and experience during the shoot

To Apply:

Please send me a direct message, respond in the comments or  email Brettsmithh316@gmail.com the following information:

• Full name and age

• Headshot and full-body photo

• Short intro (ideally a video) about yourself and why you’re interested, including previous acting/modeling experience, athletic experience, and cast/crutches experience (if any!)

• Relevant experience (performance, sports, with injury or cast/crutches etc.)

• General availability this this Thursday, Friday or Saturday 

Note: All equipment (crutches, splint/cast) will be provided. The cast is non-permanent and purely for demonstration and will be applied/removed safely.

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"
Wanted !!!!!
I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet. But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men 25 to 36 years old, good looking who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.
