items.text:
PROFIT SHARE
# **Audition notice: Underneath the Lintel**

Show dates: 20-24 October 2026

Show venue: Nottingham Arts Theatre (studio)

Audition date: 11 July 2026, 1-4 pm (you will not need to be present for the full time and will be assigned a timeslot).

Audition venue: Lace Market Theatre, Nottingham

Karuna Productions invites auditionees for *Underneath the Lintel,* a one-woman show about obsession, loneliness and the search for belonging. When a middle-aged librarian uncovers evidence that a mythical figure dating back to mediaeval times may actually exist, she embarks on an improbable, absurd quest. It will take her across the world and face to face with life’s biggest questions – and finally to a small theatre in Nottingham to share her story…
# Parts

**The Librarian **(F, 40s-50s). Dutch (accent negotiable. Support will be available as needed on pronunciation of a few Dutch words – the director is a Dutch speaker). Eccentric, single-minded, a loner, somewhat scatty. She may initially appear ordinary, even forgettable, but a great deal lurks beneath. Requires a skilled actor with excellent comic instincts, who can command an audience’s attention while convincing as someone with limited social skills and an acute interest in minutiae.

# **About the production**

The run time of the show is about 1 hour. Rehearsals will take place in Nottingham, scheduled according to the availability of actor and director. This is a profit-share production.

# **About the company**

Karuna Productions is a new theatre company based in Nottingham.

**Director: **Chris Sims. Chris is a Nottingham-based director and graduate of the Bristol Old Vic Theatre School. Examples of his work can be found at [www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk](https://www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk/).

**Producer:** Laurie Owen. Laurie is a Nottingham-based independent producer who works across theatre and comedy.

For more information or to register for an audition slot, please email Chris on [kitsims@gmail.com](mailto:kitsims@gmail.com)

sharedPost.text:
+++ Agentur Producers Friend vs. Agentur Filmgesichter u.a. Agenturen +++

Ein bekannter Berliner Podcast bekommt die Frage: "Was sagt ihr zur Komparsen-Agentur Producer's Friend?" Die ehrliche Antwort folgt...

(Lesezeit ca. 3 Min.)

Seit vielen Jahren hat Faire Gagen und ein Großteil seiner Anhängerschaft eine klare Meinung zu diesem Vergleich. Ganz ähnlich sehen dies auch die Moderatoren Frank und Thomas beim beliebten Berliner Podcast "Frisch vom Set".

Hauptkritikpunkt ist auch hier das  als unfair angesehene Geschäftsmodell der Agentur.
Nur zwei kurze Zitate: "Selbst ohne Drehtag wird abgebucht" oder "Der Name der Agentur Producer's Friends sagt eigentlich schon alles ..."

Als besonders faires Gegenbeispiel wird u.a. im Podcast die größte Berliner Agentur, Filmgesichter genannt. 
Aber auch sehr viele andere Agenturen in Berlin, NRW, Hamburg und teilweise sogar in München zeigen uns tagtäglich und seit sehr vielen Jahren, dass es auch fair und damit gleichzeitig komparsenfreundlich oder "Extras Friends" funktioniert.

Aber wie auch im Podcast und mehrfach auch von uns an alle Filmschaffende appelliert:

+++ Wir alle müssen selbst entscheiden für was wir uns wert sind zu drehen +++

+++ Dabei dürfen wir jedoch nicht  vergessen, dass wir mit diesen - nunmal in unserem Sektor völlig unüblichen - Geldern doppelt bezahlen, da ja bereits die Produktionen unsere Agenturen und damit unsere Gagen bezahlen.
Leider setzen "wir" (ob bewusst oder unbewusst) unsere vielen fair agierenden Agenturen damit jedoch zwangsläufig einem nicht unerheblichen Wettbewerbsnachteil am Markt aus +++

So müssen "wir" uns selbstkritisch hinterfragen:

"Ist es fair, wenn wir uns unsere Drehtage bei Agentur PP förmlich erkaufen und womöglich gleichzeitig bei Filmgesichter (Berlin, NRW) Wanted, Müller, Connection Berlin... (Berlin) 
Schwichtenberg, Ohler, WIWA, Eick&Weber... (NRW) Glocker ... (München) und den vielen anderen fairen Agenturen kostenlos (bzw. für zumindest überschaubare Gebühren) deren Fairness gerne mitnehmen um nicht zu sagen, einzusacken?
 
So liegt es (noch!) in unserer Hand, ob auch weiterhin unsere fairen Agenturen am Markt bleiben und nicht z.B. bedingt durch finanzielle Schieflagen sterben oder eben (notgedrungen) ähnlich bezahlte Geschäftsmodelle für uns entwerfen müssen um zu überleben (Beisp. DBF, München).

In unseren persönlichen Gesprächen mit den Agenturleitungen konnte man immerwieder heraushören, dass dieser Weg eigenlich nicht deren Philosophie sei - auch, da sie vor ihrer Agenturgründung oft selbst als Komparsen gearbeitet haben und unsere Arbeit, aber auch unsere Initiative recht gut kennen und damit unsere Beweggründe sehr gut verstehen. 
Die Lage ist jedoch teilweise recht ernst, wie bereits die Verbreitung von sogenannte Premium Modellen aufzeigt.

(Bitte gerne  (nur) auf "Faire Gagen" teilen o. zumindest reagieren, da nur so unsere textlastigen Beiträge eine wichitige Verbreitung finden. Danke🙂)

+++ Link zum Podcast und weitere Infos in der Kommentarleiste nur auf Faire Gagen 
 
Liebe Grüße 
Klaus
Initiative Faire Gagen 

... und nicht  zuletzt: Faire Gagen Sucht Nachwuchs🤗

#kompase #casting #filmschaffende #agenturen

items.text:
CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM (CINEMA). 

Dear all further to my previous casting post. I really need more submissions on these 2 below characters kindly.

Project title to be announced. Shoot begins August (exact dates for each characterTBC). 
Day rate £300 + expenses covered. 
Shoot location : In and around Birmingham area and other UK locations. 

Contact: Farhan Baqi 
farhan.baqi@mcccuk.co.uk
Please send a couple of photographs or a Spotlight link. 

It is extremely important to mention the character name you are applying for in the subject line of the email please (Makes my life easier 😛 )

I would like to add that most of the below characters have decent amount of dates, these are not one or two liners roles and therefore looking for experienced / trained actors 

Roles: 

LIZ (18–24): (Ginger hair)
One of the key characters on this production.
Fun, confident British Caucasion girl with ginger hair and an outgoing personality. Loyal, courageous, protective of friends. Must have a Birmingham or surrounding‑area accent (or be able to perform one). Musical background a plus but not essential. 

ANDRE – BAND MEMBER (18–24): 
Black / African British Third‑generation Caribbean Brit with charisma and rhythm. Natural performer with strong musical energy. Musical background ideal. 

Thank you

topComments.text:
Phil Kaye, 

I’ve noticed you’ve been commenting on several of my recent posts, so I wanted to address your concerns directly, although I’m still not entirely sure what the issue is. 

I am a London based Casting Director (and a Spotlight registered Actor) and an associate with Mukesh Chhabra Casting Company (MCCC), one of the leading and most reputable casting organisations in India. 

Many actors in this group and beyond can vouch for the legitimacy and professionalism of our work. 

If you have a specific concern, you are welcome to raise it with the group admin. 

I hope we can move past unnecessary comments going forward. 

Regards, FB
Be careful people, they are reposting it yet again

items.text:
FEATURE FILM – ASHES

Atlanta, GA | Non-Union | Paid
Rate: Starting at $300/day (negotiable for the right fit)
Shoot Window: Fall 2026

Casting Update:
Most principal and supporting roles have been cast. We are reopening submissions for the LEAD role of CAMILLE REYES.

LOGLINE

When a sharp Atlanta attorney is assigned to represent the estranged husband of her closest friend, buried history, desire, and betrayal force three people to choose what they’re willing to lose when loyalty turns to ash.

CAMILLE REYES (LEAD)

Woman, 30s
All ethnicities encouraged to submit.

A highly controlled Atlanta attorney whose carefully ordered life begins to unravel when unresolved feelings resurface during her best friend’s divorce case.

Camille carries the majority of the film and requires an actor capable of emotional restraint, intelligence, vulnerability, and strong screen presence. We’re looking for someone who can communicate internal conflict through behavior, silence, and subtle shifts rather than speeches.

Please submit:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)
• Demo reel or self-tape
• Contact information

Subject Line:
ASHES – CAMILLE SUBMISSION

Send to:
S.johnsonstudiosatl@gmail.com

sharedPost.text:
Wanted!!
I'm having another creative burst.
Project called Just Go - The Day I left Kevin Costner 
I thought I'd do a casting call the other way around 
I want to make a short film between 10 and 30 minutes long—depending on how many actors want to participate. No pay.
You let me know if you want to participate as an actor and then I'll write a totally crazy script.
Just write "I want to" in the coments, and things can get crazy. or write a mail to Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
Every actor is shooting on his own a scene with his smart shone about 3 sentences and I will cut of those scenes the movie.The movie will be shown on International Film festivals. 
I'm excited to hear from you. 
Thats me ;

items.text:
Calling all young actors.
We are looking for individuals with a comedic flair or potential to feature in our social media content. Although this is an unpaid opportunity, the videos will be shared and can serve as valuable reels for future productions.

@highlight 

Applicants should be based in Etwatwa or Daveyton and audition via self-tapes, which can be sent to 078 121 4807 via WhatsApp. 

We will review all submissions and be in touch.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: JESSICA — Supernatural Horror Feature Film

Non-Union
Rate: $200/day
Shooting location: Winnipeg, MB
Shoot dates: July 2026

Roles:
Susie — Lead · Female · 27–33
Jacob — Lead · Male · must read as 7
Jessica — Lead · Female · must read as 7
Olivia — Supporting · Female · must read as 7
Ken — Supporting · Male · late 50s–mid 60s — CAST
David — Supporting · Male · mid-30s — CAST

The roles of Ken and David have been cast. Please do not apply for those roles.

Role Commitments:
Susie — 12 shoot days
Jacob — 12 shoot days
Jessica — 8 shoot days
Olivia — 2 shoot days

Submission deadline: June 17, 2026

Submit a recent headshot, resume, and reel if available.

Apply here:
jessicahorrorfilm.com

Please do not send Facebook messages. Use the contact information on the website.
